name: md-to-word
description: Markdown to Word DOCX converter powered by Pandoc.

scripts.app:open: npm run build && APP_AUTO_OPEN=1 node dist/server.js
scripts.convert:fixture: npm run build && node dist/cli.js tests/fixtures/complex.md -o tmp/complex.docx --reference-doc assets/reference.docx --toc --number-sections
